command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'

ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 bash << 'REMOTE'
set -e
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai

echo '=== APPEND RUNTIME ARTIFACTS TO .gitignore ==='
cat >> .gitignore << 'GITIGNORE'

# Runtime artifacts (added 2026-06-25 by Claude orchestrator — approved by 3060 preflight)
.chatgpt_backups/
memory/audit/
memory/council/
memory/execution-pipeline/commits/
memory/execution-pipeline/governed/
memory/execution-pipeline/patches/
memory/execution-pipeline/plans/
memory/execution-pipeline/rollback/
memory/execution-pipeline/validation/
memory/operator/audit/
memory/operator/completed/
GITIGNORE
echo "gitignore updated"

echo '=== GIT STATUS AFTER GITIGNORE ==='
git status --short | head -20

echo '=== COMMIT WAVE 1: tracked file changes + gitignore ==='
git config user.email "claude@moreno-ai" 2>/dev/null || true
git config user.name "Claude (orchestrator)" 2>/dev/null || true
git add .gitignore runtime/operator_runtime.py memory/operator/handoff/latest-chatgpt-handoff.md memory/operator/shared/current-focus.md
git commit -m "chore: clean working tree — gitignore runtime artifacts, commit operator updates

WP-1 (3060/qwen3:8b 37.6s): classified 17 untracked paths, 10 flagged as runtime artifacts
WP-2 (3090 timeout → Claude review): 3 modified tracked files assessed safe to commit

Changes:
- .gitignore: added memory/execution-pipeline runtime dirs, memory/audit, memory/council,
  memory/operator/audit, memory/operator/completed, .chatgpt_backups
- runtime/operator_runtime.py: requires_approval validation + approval gate (from Jun 19 session)
- memory/operator/handoff/latest-chatgpt-handoff.md: Phase 8.4 handoff from ChatGPT
- memory/operator/shared/current-focus.md: updated to Phase 8.4 by ChatGPT

Task record: /home/jose/moreno-tasks/intake/task-repo-cleanup-20260625.json"

echo '=== COMMIT WAVE 2: untracked docs ==='
git add docs/governed-autonomy-architecture.md docs/governed-autonomy-implementation-plan.md     docs/governed-autonomy-schema.md docs/moreno-operator-capability-profile.md     docs/moreno-operator-package-authoring.md docs/phase-advancement-controller.md     docs/phase-implementation-staging-runner.md 2>/dev/null || echo "some docs missing, continuing"
git diff --cached --name-only | head -10
STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only | wc -l)
if [ "$STAGED" -gt "0" ]; then
    git commit -m "docs: commit untracked operator/governance docs from Phase 8.4-9E sessions"
fi

echo '=== FINAL STATUS ==='
git status --short | head -20
git log --oneline -4

REMOTE
echo DONE_1930
